author: Pxx500
name: NHMisc
install_msg:
Thank you for installing this cog.
Do `[p]help NHMisc` to get the list of commands and their description.
description: A placeholder cog intended for miscellaneous small bot functionality.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs with passively collected message-count aggregates for configurable short-term activity detail retention. Closed daily summary history stores aggregate counts and channel IDs, but not user IDs. It does not store message content or message IDs.
